Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
